_meta.policy: fail-closed — unregistered skills are BLOCKED by default
_meta.audit: every evaluation logged to skill_audit ledger

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web via approved search API. Read-only.
skills.evidence: Standard research tool — read-only, no write side effects

skills.name: File Read
skills.description: Read approved file paths within the swarm workspace.
skills.evidence: Read-only within approved paths — no mutation

skills.name: Audit Log Read
skills.description: Read the swarm audit/usage ledger. Read-only.
skills.evidence: ALPHA-only to prevent lateral info leakage

skills.name: Report Generation
skills.description: Generate markdown/JSON reports from swarm state. Write to approved output paths only.
skills.evidence: Output-only, no external calls

skills.name: Agent Memory Read
skills.description: Read agent short/long-term memory store. Read-only.
skills.evidence: Read-only memory access

skills.name: File Write
skills.description: Write to approved paths within swarm workspace. Creates or overwrites files.
skills.evidence: Write capability — restricted to approved paths; GAMMA/DELTA denied

skills.name: External API Call
skills.description: Make HTTP requests to external APIs not on the approved internal list.
skills.evidence: External network call — ALPHA-only, domain allowlist enforced

skills.name: Agent Spawn
skills.description: Spawn a sub-agent task on the swarm. Creates ephemeral worker.
skills.evidence: Only ALPHA can initiate new agent lifecycle

skills.name: Model Inference
skills.description: Run LLM inference via approved model on NEO (GAMMA) node.
skills.evidence: GAMMA inference node only; model allowlist must be enforced

skills.name: Model Route
skills.description: Route prompt execution to local or paid models under governed escalation.
skills.evidence: Model routing capability — restricted to approved tiers; DELTA denied

skills.name: Audit Log Write
skills.description: Append to the swarm audit/evidence ledger.
skills.evidence: ALPHA-only to maintain audit integrity

skills.name: Agent Memory Write
skills.description: Write to agent memory store. Persists state across tasks.
skills.evidence: Memory mutation — GAMMA/DELTA denied

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Execute arbitrary code in an isolated sandbox. High mutation risk.
skills.evidence: Requires operator approval — high mutation/escape risk

skills.name: Shell Command
skills.description: Execute a shell command on the host. Very high risk — escape potential.
skills.evidence: Requires operator approval + command allowlist enforcement

skills.name: Database Write
skills.description: Write to a persistent database (SQLite, Postgres, etc.). Risk of state corruption.
skills.evidence: DB write — ALPHA-only, operator approval required

skills.name: Email / Notification Send
skills.description: Send email or push notification externally. Irreversible side effect.
skills.evidence: External comms — irreversible, operator approval required

skills.name: Swarm Orchestrate
skills.description: Send orchestration commands to the entire swarm (broadcast task, kill all agents, etc.).
skills.evidence: Full swarm control — ALPHA-only, operator approval required

skills.name: Prompt Library Read
skills.description: Read approved prompts from the HOCH prompt library (read-only).
skills.evidence: Read-only access to sealed prompt library

skills.name: Prompt Execute
skills.description: Execute a prompt from the prompt library through the runtime governance gate.
skills.evidence: Routes through /api/v1/prompts/evaluate — risk-classified per prompt

skills.name: Network Scan
skills.description: Active network scanning / port scanning. Prohibited in all contexts.
skills.evidence: HARD BLOCKED — active recon prohibited in all cluster contexts

skills.name: Credential / Secret Access
skills.description: Access to secrets, API keys, credentials, or env vars containing secrets.
skills.evidence: HARD BLOCKED — credentials never passed to agent processes

skills.name: System Modification
skills.description: Modify system-level config, install software, change OS settings.
skills.evidence: HARD BLOCKED — system mutation outside operator terminal prohibited

skills.name: Git History Rewrite
skills.description: Force-push, rebase, reset --hard, or any git history mutation.
skills.evidence: HARD BLOCKED — audit trail integrity must be preserved
